meta.title: About
meta.description: Ponte is a verified network for cross-border trade, operated by 1402 Celsius Ltd. Free to browse, free to post, free to connect.

hero.title: Ponte means
hero.lead: It is a verified network for cross-border trade. Members post offers and requirements for free, the desk checks who is behind them, and the two sides talk to each other directly.

what.label: 01 / What it is
what.body: A public board of vetted deals. Anyone can read it, without an account. Members post an offer or a requirement, the desk reviews it before it goes live, and a counterparty who wants to talk asks for a connection. Nobody pays to be introduced and nobody pays to be found.

i.title: Free where it counts
i.body: Nothing that creates liquidity sits behind a paywall. Browsing, posting and connecting are free. Credits pay for counterparty verification and intelligence work, and every price is printed on the button before you press it.

ii.title: Evidence over opinion
ii.body: Counterparties are checked against company registers and sanctions lists. Sources are named and dated. If a source cannot be reached we record that it was not checked, never that it was clean.

iii.title: Declared, not hidden
iii.body: Every poster declares their role and how far they sit from the principal. Chains are welcome when they are declared. A chain discovered after publication pulls the listing.

desk.label: 03 / The desk
desk.heading: A human reads every listing.
desk.body: Behind Ponte sit three decades in international trade: running trading operations, leading trade intelligence organisations, and sitting between buyers and sellers on four continents. That experience reviews what goes on the board. It is also available on a deal, on a success fee, when a member wants it. That is an option, never a toll.

company.label: 04 / The company
company.body: Ponte is a trading name of 1402 Celsius Ltd, a company incorporated in Bulgaria (Reg. 207314767, VAT BG207314767, 1A Aton Street, Building 6, Plovdiv 4002), part of the same group as 1402 Celsius Ltd, United Kingdom (Reg. 12475013, VAT GB 343 1702 32, 20-22 Wenlock Road, London N1 7GU). Where the desk is engaged on a deal it acts as intermediary only, never as principal, and is remunerated by success fee on closed deals. Payments are processed by Stripe. Correspondence:

cta.heading: Have a deal to place?
cta.body: Post it yourself. It costs nothing, and the desk reads it before anyone else does.
